items.summary: Panel grid extended to sections 8 (Results & Measures) and 9 (Next Steps) — add half/full-width text, image, and table panels; section 8 includes a dedicated before/after table panel. Pareto charts now render correctly in print-to-PDF including Chrome. 4C panel display bug fixed.
Bug fix: phase limit inheritance corrected — Phase 2 and later phases now lock with the right limits. All phases show limit lines and labels on chart.

Therefore Validation — check the logic of your Why chain by reading it bottom-up; flag logic gaps per pair. Evidence completeness indicator in the export panel. Print / Save as PDF — generate a one-page governance-ready summary.
Stability improvements and updated modal layout.
New standard work template features and improved print layout.
Disclaimer and governance update across all apps and the licence page — clarifying medical device status, data storage, and liability.
